case_title: HIN DON HUEY et al VS. NANCY HUEY et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT HUEY, NANCY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUEY, HIN DON HUEY, PUI FONG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUEY, NANCY ELY, LLOYD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 123 15TH AVENUE SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL JUN-30-2002, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT PLAINTIFFS SHALL PAY $6,000 TO NANCY HUEY AND $6,000.00 TO LLOYD ELY PAYABLE HALF UPON THE APPROVAL OF THE COURT AND HALF UPON SURRENDERING THE PREMISES ON OR BEFORE 6/30/02 AT 5:00 P.M.
